summary: Phase 0B release-smoke closure accepted after task, goal, continuation, registry, and autonomous stop state were closed deterministically.
acceptance_notes: The release smoke covers local admin auth helpers, Radar Task helper/read-model behavior, mock scan request shape, opportunity detail readiness, and MVP Spec readiness without network.
README covers the Phase 0A/0B split, local admin gate, Radar Task UI workflow, fresh-checkout validation, and human-gated provider/deployment boundaries.
The task is CLOSED, goal-mode state and continuation have no active/current/ready tasks, reviewer registry entries are closed, and project_goal_complete is explicitly recorded.
verify-autonomous-stop returns ALLOW_STOP with no dependency-ready or active tasks.
residual_risks: The QA re-review was read-only and did not rerun npm run build, but the release engineer recorded a passing build for the same closure changes.
